allow: Bash(do ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@192.168.0.$ip "hostname; ip -br addr show br-ex")

Bash(for ip in 62 63; do echo "=== 192.168.0.$ip ===" && ssh root@192.168.0.$ip "systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl restart ceph-53d0a38b-1117-11f1-873a-52540064d271.target && systemctl list-units 'ceph*' --no-pager | grep running" 2>&1; done)
